entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Lets get to the phase 5 so the chat is able to load models and actually work the way we designed it. This include all the MAX/Research/Deep Research/Thinking and whatever else may or may not need to be fully added! Lets make sure that our custom model loading is the only thing we are using to ensure we get those speeds we reverse engineered everything so long for to get as well!'
